scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,CASHIER" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix cashier-app"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix cashier-app
scripts.seed:all: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
